home.bio: 7+ years building scalable, high-quality web applications. Specialized in .NET and C#, with hands-on experience in React, Next.js, AWS, and modern cloud architectures. Passionate about clean code and elegant solutions.
home.exp1_desc: Where it all started. Joined Morning Star fresh and dove into .NET development — fixing bugs, learning the codebase, and building a solid foundation in backend engineering.
home.exp2_desc: Earned the promotion after 2+ years of consistent delivery. Started owning features end-to-end, designing RESTful APIs, and introducing Clean Architecture to legacy codebases.
home.exp3_desc: Started a side venture — a digital agency delivering WordPress and React/.NET solutions. Wore every hat: developer, designer, account manager, and sales. Shipped for 150+ clients.
home.exp4_desc: The title I worked towards. Now designing distributed systems on AWS, mentoring juniors, and driving architectural decisions. Still the same curiosity, just more surface area.
home.blog_section_desc: Thoughts on software engineering, architecture, and development.
